title: Views with select on top of join - attribute lookup problem
poc: create table y (n int, s varchar(10));
create view yv as select s as a1, n as a2 from y;
create view j as select yv.a2 as a1, yv.a1 as a2 from x,yv where x.id = yv.a2;
key_bug_features: Views with select on top of join
bug_features_seed: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS a CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE a (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL);
CREATE VIEW av AS SELECT id, value FROM a WHERE id > 1;
CREATE VIEW j AS SELECT av.id AS a1, av.value AS a2 FROM av WHERE a1 = 2;
